column1: Among the listed companies and their bond conditions, what is the highest coupon-adjusted yield when considering Microsoft Corporation's 1-3 year (belly) bonds with intercreditor subordination and payment blockage clause; Siemens AG's 10-20 year (long end) bonds with restricted payments basket for capex and M&A carve-outs; Volkswagen AG's 7-10 year (core) bonds with restricted payments basket for capex and M&A carve-outs; and JPMorgan Chase & Co.'s 20-30 year (ultra long) bonds with change-of-control put and deleveraging trigger?,"SELECT MAX(CouponAdjustedYield) AS CouponAdjustedYield FROM (SELECT CouponAdjustedYield AS CouponAdjustedYield FROM IssuerCreditYieldRegistry WHERE IssuerLEI = ""Volkswagen AG"" AND MaturityTenorBucket = ""7-10 year core"" AND CovenantShadowDescription = ""restricted payments basket for capex and M&A carve-outs"" UNION ALL SELECT CouponAdjustedYield AS CouponAdjustedYield FROM IssuerCreditYieldRegistry WHERE IssuerLEI = ""Siemens AG"" AND MaturityTenorBucket = ""10-20 year long end"" AND CovenantShadowDescription = ""restricted payments basket for capex and M&A carve-outs"" UNION ALL SELECT CouponAdjustedYield AS CouponAdjustedYield FROM IssuerCreditYieldRegistry WHERE IssuerLEI = ""JPMorgan Chase & Co."" AND MaturityTenorBucket = ""20-30 year ultra long"" AND CovenantShadowDescription = ""change-of-control put and deleveraging trigger"" UNION ALL SELECT CouponAdjustedYield AS CouponAdjustedYield FROM IssuerCreditYieldRegistry WHERE IssuerLEI = ""Microsoft Corporation"" AND MaturityTenorBucket = ""1-3 year belly"" AND CovenantShadowDescription = ""intercreditor subordination and payment blockage clause"")
